summary: This release improves citation quality, restores date-filtering capabilities, and ensures follow-up suggestions load reliably.

entries.title: Restored temporal query and date filtering
entries.description: Queries specifying time periods (such as 'last 6 months') now correctly filter search results by document publication date instead of returning the entire unfiltered library.

entries.title: Clearer alerts for fallback search results
entries.description: When a targeted search returns no results, the application now clearly notifies you that it has broadened its search across all products and time periods.

entries.title: Cleaner citation previews in side panel
entries.description: Citation previews in the side panel now display the actual content of the source document instead of structural headers, making it easier to evaluate search results at a glance.

entries.title: Deduplicated citations for cleaner results
entries.description: When multiple versions of the same documentation topic are found, the citation panel now collapses them into a single entry for the latest version, reducing clutter.

entries.title: Scrollable citation panel for many sources
entries.description: Resolved an issue where users could not scroll through the citation panel on smaller screens when a response referenced more than six sources.

entries.title: Reliable follow-up suggestion chips
entries.description: Follow-up question chips now consistently appear during rapid back-to-back queries, automatically handling rate limits in the background.

entries.title: Temporary response generation latency
entries.description: Average response times range from 18 to 28 seconds while text generation is being processed. Streaming responses are planned for a future release to improve perceived speed.

entries.title: Version filtering unavailable for Cortex XSIAM
entries.description: Because Cortex XSIAM documentation is organized by date rather than version number, queries specifying an XSIAM version will return a notice and search across all XSIAM documentation.

entries.title: Limited coverage for Cortex AgentiX
entries.description: Queries regarding the newly launched Cortex AgentiX may draw from general XSOAR documentation while the dedicated AgentiX document catalog is being built out.
